movies.overview: A misfit group of unwitting high school students stumble upon a cursed object, an ancient Aztec Death Whistle. They discover that blowing the whistle and the terrifying sound it emits will summon their future deaths to hunt them down.
movies.tagline: Don't blow it.
movies.title: Whistle

movies.overview: Moira Cole endeavors to rebuild her shattered life after her family's murder at the hands of her deranged and obsessed cousin.
movies.title: Bloodline Killer

movies.original_title: カラダ探し THE LAST NIGHT
movies.overview: Three years after completing a deadly game, high schoolers trapped in a looping nightmare must survive brutal encounters and unravel a terrifying curse.
movies.title: Re/Member: The Last Night

movies.overview: When James receives a mysterious letter from his lost love Mary, he is drawn to Silent Hill—a once-familiar town now consumed by darkness. As he searches for her, James faces monstrous creatures and unravels a terrifying truth that will push him to the edge of his sanity.
movies.tagline: Guilt is a place you can never leave.
movies.title: Return to Silent Hill

movies.overview: Alpha, a troubled 13-year-old lives with her single mom. Their world collapses the day she returns from school with a tattoo on her arm.
movies.tagline: Love leaves a mark.
movies.title: Alpha

movies.overview: When a new Ghostface killer emerges in the quiet town where Sidney Prescott has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target. Determined to protect her family, Sidney must face the horrors of her past to put an end to the bloodshed once and for all.
movies.tagline: Burn it all down.
movies.title: Scream 7

movies.overview: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.
movies.tagline: Dance with the devil.
movies.title: Sinners

movies.overview: When a mutating, highly contagious fungus escapes a sealed facility, two employees – joined by a grizzled bioterror operative – must survive the wildest night shift ever to save humanity from extinction.
movies.tagline: If it spreads, you're dead.
movies.title: Cold Storage

movies.overview: Paranormal investigators Kris, Celina and their videographer Jay are rerouted to an abandoned house deep in the woods, where they find themselves facing a force unlike anything they've encountered before. As the night spirals into chaos, missing crew members and eerie phenomena hint at an ancient, malevolent presence watching their every move.
movies.title: House on Eden

movies.overview: Dr. Victor Frankenstein, a brilliant but egotistical scientist, brings a creature to life in a monstrous experiment that ultimately leads to the undoing of both the creator and his tragic creation.
movies.tagline: Only monsters play God.
movies.title: Frankenstein

movies.overview: A group of friends facing mid-life crises head to the rainforest with the intention of remaking their favorite movie from their youth, only to find themselves in a fight for their lives against natural disasters, giant snakes and violent criminals.
movies.tagline: A comedy so big it'll leave you breathless.
movies.title: Anaconda

movies.overview: A horde of giant hungry alligators is unleashed on a group of in-transit prisoners and their guards after a massive hurricane floods Louisiana.
movies.tagline: Danger is rising.
movies.title: The Flood

movies.overview: Dr. Kelson finds himself in a shocking new relationship - with consequences that could change the world as they know it - and Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.
movies.tagline: Fear is the new faith.
movies.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple

movies.overview: The crew of the colony ship Covenant, bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, discovers what they think is an uncharted paradise but is actually a dark, dangerous world.
movies.tagline: The path to paradise begins in hell.
movies.title: Alien: Covenant

movies.overview: A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to ask groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious to create a companion for him. The two revive a murdered young woman and The Bride is born. But what ensues is beyond what either of them imagined.
movies.tagline: Here comes the mother f*%#ing bride!
movies.title: The Bride!

movies.overview: Five years ago, a tear in the fabric of reality brought creatures to our world from an alternate dimension bent on our destruction. A father hides his daughter on an island to keep her safe while he prepares her for survival and the battles to come. But when the world is about to break, no place is safe.
movies.tagline: The future belongs to those who fight.
movies.title: Worldbreaker

movies.overview: A wealthy family hosts a sumptuous dinner, only for a mysterious young server to chillingly unravel their lives with terrifying consequences they could never see coming.
movies.tagline: While they feast, she waits.
movies.title: The Feast

movies.overview: Zombie Prom is a 1950s horror comic book brought to life as a musical comedy film. It is a campy, rollicking, romp through America's "Atomic Age" and the "Golden Age" of horror comic books. Here's the story...  Set in the fabulous '50s, this is the tale of a sweet teenage girl named, TOFFEE (a Gidget-type) and her "rebel without a cause" boyfriend, JONNY. The two meet at Enrico Fermi High School and fall in love, but the principal, MISS DELILAH STRICT (Stalin in pumps and a dress!) intervenes, persuading the indecisive young Toffee to break up with Jonny. Tortured by the betrayal, Jonny drives his motorcycle to the nearby Francis Gary Powers Nuclear Power Plant and flings himself into a nuclear cooling tower! But then he returns as a teenage nuclear zombie
movies.tagline: An Alarming Anecdote of Atomic Adolescent Angst!
movies.title: Zombie Prom

movies.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.
movies.tagline: Last night at 2:17 AM, every child from Mrs. Gandy's class woke up, got out of bed, went downstairs, opened the front door, walked into the dark ...and they never came back.
movies.title: Weapons

movies.overview: In late 15th-century Eastern Europe, Prince Vlad II’s bride is brutally murdered. As a result, he renounces God and damns Heaven itself. Cursed with eternal life, Vlad is reborn as Dracula, an immortal warlord who defies fate in a blood-soaked crusade to wrench his lost love back from death.
movies.tagline: He renounced his faith to become immortal. Passion, anger, vengeance, and hatred will be unleashed into the modern world.
movies.title: Dracula

movies.overview: The story follows a young woman battling a drug addiction who suddenly begins to see a mutated mouse human hybrid who infests her life. Those around her begin to drop like flies.
movies.tagline: Get ready for the last ride of your life.
movies.title: Mouseboat Massacre

movies.overview: On August 12, 1967, in Montana's Glacier National Park, the unthinkable happened: that same night, nine miles apart, there were not one—but two—fatal grizzly bear attacks.
movies.tagline: Two attacks. One night.
movies.title: Grizzly Night

movies.overview: A novelist's wife and son see him changed by an apparent encounter with aliens in the mountains.
movies.tagline: The true story of one man's terrifying journey into the unknown.
movies.title: Communion

movies.overview: Special Forces commandos on a mission are abducted mid-operation by a mysterious spacecraft. Upon waking aboard, they find themselves prey to a relentless alien race in a fight for survival.
movies.tagline: Earth’s deadliest soldiers just became the galaxy’s last hope.
movies.title: Osiris

movies.overview: One year since the supernatural nightmare at Freddy Fazbear's Pizza, the stories about what transpired there have been twisted into a campy local legend, inspiring the town's first ever Fazfest. With the truth kept from her, Abby sneaks out to reconnect with Freddy, Bonnie, Chica, and Foxy, setting into motion a terrifying series of events that will reveal dark secrets about the real origin of Freddy's, and unleash a decades-hidden horror.
movies.tagline: You there?
movies.title: Five Nights at Freddy's 2

movies.overview: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.
movies.tagline: Meet Linda Liddle... She's from strategy and planning. She's the boss now.
movies.title: Send Help

movies.overview: Christmas Eve. On his way to his in-laws with his family, Frank Harrington decides to try a shortcut, for the first time in 20 years. It turns out to be the biggest mistake of his life.
movies.tagline: Read the signs.
movies.title: Dead End

movies.overview: Marine biologist Johanne is doing research on a fish farm in Vangsnes, a rural community located by the fjord, when she encounters several strange occurrences. Along with the brutal deaths of two local teenagers, all signs point to the deep fjord; can there be more to the depths than the eye can see? At the bottom of the deepest fjord rests a mythical monster as large as a mountain, with a myriad of arms ready to crush and devour anything they can grab.
movies.title: Kraken

movies.overview: Lucy, a college student, along with her friends, spend their vacation at her family's home in Hawaii, which includes her pet chimpanzee, Ben. However, when Ben contracts rabies after being bitten by a rabid animal, the group must fight for their lives in order to avoid the now-violent chimp.
movies.tagline: Something's wrong with Ben.
movies.title: Primate

movies.overview: An American family moves to Mexico to fabricate dolls, but their toy factory happens to be next to a Sanzian grave and the toys come into possession of an old, malicious spirit.
movies.tagline: It's time to play...
movies.title: Dolly Dearest

movies.overview: A group of friends attempt to escape the city after an outbreak of demon-possessions. The friends seek shelter in an abandoned church, but their plans for escape are ruined when one of them becomes possessed.
movies.tagline: The undead will rise.
movies.title: Gates of Flesh

movies.overview: The story focuses on the most haunted village in the world.
movies.tagline: Based on the true story of Britain's most haunted village.
movies.title: The Haunting of Pluckley Village

movies.overview: Tethered by a frightening conclusion, Maya and the Strangers are locked on an unavoidable, unforgiving collision course — a showdown that proves they’re far from strangers now.
movies.tagline: Embrace your fears.
movies.title: The Strangers: Chapter 3

movies.overview: When some very creepy things start happening around school, the kids at Herrington High make the chilling discovery that confirms their worst suspicions: their teachers really are from another planet!
movies.tagline: These six students are about to discover their teachers really are from another planet.
movies.title: The Faculty

movies.overview: A woman's hope for a miracle cure turns into a nightmare when she confronts the vengeful spirit of a cursed witch, determined to claim her as a vessel for her evil power.
movies.tagline: God forgives... evil doesn't.
movies.title: Diabolic

movies.overview: After moving into a mysterious rental house in Amityville, New York, Artificial intelligence programmer Stuart Birdsall encounters an evil force so vile and deadly that it kills his wife, his friends, and strips him of his sanity. But for Stuart Birdsall, the worst is yet to come. Released from a mental institution, Stuart is immediately kidnapped by federal agents. It appears that the deadly evil that infected his program has now infected government systems. Stuart is given an offer he cannot refuse. With the help of a VIRTUAL REALITY headset, Stuart must enter a simulation. A manufactured labyrinth of evil; populated by a nightmarish collection of demons and creatures hell bent on the annihilation of the human race. He must destroy the demon in charge, or die trying!
movies.tagline: For God's Sake, Stop the Simulation!
movies.title: Amityville VR

movies.overview: When Maureen Coyle, a suicidal nun who resembles Norman's former victim, Marion Crane, arrives at the motel, all bets are off and "Mother" is less than happy.
movies.tagline: Norman Bates is back to normal. But mother's off her rocker again.
movies.title: Psycho III

movies.overview: In medieval England, Anne and her domineering mother-in-law Morwen struggle to survive on the outskirts of society. But when a man from Anne's past returns from war, a curse begins to take shape through a mysterious knight and threatens to destroy them all.
movies.tagline: In a country torn by war, survival comes at all costs… and darkness closes in.
movies.title: The Dreadful

movies.original_title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
movies.overview: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren encounter what would become one of the most sensational cases from their files. The fight for the soul of a young boy takes them beyond anything they'd ever seen before, to mark the first time in U.S. history that a murder suspect would claim demonic possession as a defense.
movies.tagline: The demonic case that shocked America.
movies.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It

movies.overview: Plagued by a violent recurring nightmare, college student Stefanie heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.
movies.tagline: Death runs in the family.
movies.title: Final Destination Bloodlines

movies.overview: Retired porn star Milos leads a normal family life trying to make ends meet. Presented with the opportunity of a lifetime to financially support his family for the rest of their lives, Milos must participate in one last mysterious film. From then on, Milos is drawn into a maelstrom of unbelievable cruelty and mayhem.
movies.tagline: Not all films have a happy ending
movies.title: A Serbian Film

movies.overview: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront.
movies.tagline: The case that ended it all.
movies.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites

movies.original_title: LSD -ラッキースカイダイアモンド-
movies.overview: At the clinic where her boyfriend Katayama, a young genius doctor, is the director, Yoko, a young girl who continues to suffer from eerie nightmares every day, is not getting better despite the care of her sister Sakurako and Katayama's treatment. Sakurako, the sister, is suspicious of Yoko's condition and confronts Katayama, who tells her that she suffers from a serious mental disorder and that the only way to cure it is to have brain surgery. Yoko, despite being persuaded by her sister and Katayama, agrees to the surgery, although she is skeptical...
movies.title: Lucky Sky Diamond

movies.overview: A graveyard rendezvous that isn’t just about love, but about fulfilling a promise – and facing its consequences.  A family weekend that digs up buried secrets – secrets that perhaps should have stayed underground forever.  A legendary VHS tape, worth killing for – or maybe someone already has.  And a childhood tale that proves, years later: sometimes the scariest things are the ones we believed were true as kids.  From Horrorszkóp and Cruel World Team comes four dark and unsettling stories in this chilling horror anthology.  Each one steeped in the shadow of death, human weakness, and the grim truth that the ending is never what you expect.  Four stories. Four secrets. Four inevitable ends.
movies.title: The Four Gates of Death

movies.overview: During its return to the earth, commercial spaceship Nostromo intercepts a distress signal from a distant planet. When a three-member team of the crew discovers a chamber containing thousands of eggs on the planet, a creature inside one of the eggs attacks an explorer. The entire crew is unaware of the impending nightmare set to descend upon them when the alien parasite planted inside its unfortunate host is birthed.
movies.tagline: In space no one can hear you scream.
movies.title: Alien

movies.overview: A story of broken humanity following the invasion of a technologically superior alien species. Bleak, harrowing, and unrelenting, the humans must find enough courage to go on fighting.
movies.title: Rakka

movies.original_title: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come
movies.overview: Moments after surviving an all-out attack from the Le Domas family, Grace discovers she’s reached the next level of the nightmarish game — and this time with her estranged sister Faith at her side. Grace has one chance to survive, keep her sister alive, and claim the High Seat of the Council that controls the world. Four rival families are hunting her for the throne, and whoever wins rules it all.
movies.tagline: Double or nothing.
movies.title: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come

movies.overview: Two parents enter a race against time when they receive a distressing late-night phone call from their daughter after she caused a tragic car accident.
movies.title: Hallow Road
